title: Sling

The '''sling''' was a primitive weapon that hurled metal bullets or stones.<ref name="RPG-Core">''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook]]''</ref> Usually, they were made of [[Leather/Legends|leather]] and cord. The [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] were known to use these, and one user was female Ewok warrior [[Asha/Legends|Asha]]. [[Treek/Legends|Treek]], another Ewok, employed slings to shoot the healing substance [[Ewokese/Legends|fektur]] at friendlies.

A [[Stereb]] in [[Prak City]] named [[Herdr'tui]] also used a sling.<ref name="DoD9:Sword of the Empire">{{DoD|Sword of the Empire}}</ref>

The semi-sentient [[Rancor/Legends#Dathomir|Dathomiri rancors]] were able to make and use simple tools, including slings.<ref name="Threats of the Galaxy">''[[Threats of the Galaxy]]''</ref>

[[File:Jarjarboomas.jpg|thumb|[[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] picking up a [[Booma/Legends|booma]] in a sling during the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]]]
In addition, [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] used slings to propel medium-sized [[Booma/Legends|boomas]] too large to fit into [[Cesta/Legends|cestas]] and [[Atlatl/Legends|atlatls]], and too small for catapults, as seen during the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]].

{{Weapon-stub}}
